name: colyseus-devops
description: Colyseus deployment, scaling, and monitoring reference. Covers multi-process scaling (RedisPresence, RedisDriver), PM2 configuration, NGINX reverse proxy, Docker, hosting options, Colyseus Monitor, Colyseus Playground, CORS, graceful shutdown, room caching, and performance tuning. Use when deploying a Colyseus server, scaling to multiple processes, setting up reverse proxies, monitoring rooms, or optimizing server performance.
